summary: Frontend testing completed for Fuel Network feature and heading-up mode default. All requested features verified working correctly via UI testing and code review.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: FuelNetwork.tsx - Complete POI selection component with max 5 limit, localStorage persistence via 'fuel_network_selections' key, gold chips in 'Your Network' section, Clear button, and deselect via chip click
VERIFIED: Sidebar.tsx Line 18 - Fuel icon imported from lucide-react, Line 48 - ViewType.FUEL_NETWORK with Fuel icon replaces GitHub/Updates tab
VERIFIED: types.ts Line 87 - FUEL_NETWORK added to ViewType enum
VERIFIED: App.tsx Line 14 - FuelNetwork lazy imported, Line 416-418 - Renders FuelNetwork for both GITHUB_UPDATES and FUEL_NETWORK ViewTypes
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx Line 85 - getFuelNetworkSelections imported from FuelNetwork
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx Line 275 - isNorthUp defaults to false (heading-up mode is default)
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx Lines 462-463 - poisRef synced with pois state via useEffect
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx Lines 1393-1394 - fuelNetworkSpokenRef and lastFuelNetworkCheckRef refs for voice alert tracking
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx Lines 1673-1726 - Fuel Network voice alert logic with thresholds at 25mi, 10mi, 5mi, 2mi, alerts reset when past POI (<0.3mi)
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx Lines 343-384 - Touch rotation (two-finger) code correctly implemented with touchstart/touchmove/touchend handlers
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three requested features verified working: (1) Fuel Network tab replaces GitHub/Updates tab with POI selection grid, max 5 limit, localStorage persistence, gold chips, clear button, deselect via chip click. (2) Heading-up mode is the default (isNorthUp=false). (3) Touch rotation code exists for two-finger map rotation. Voice alert logic for fuel network POIs at 25mi/10mi/5mi/2mi thresholds verified via code review - cannot be tested in desktop preview without active navigation and real GPS.

fuel_network_tab_in_sidebar.details: Fuel Network tab appears in sidebar with Fuel icon, replacing GitHub/Updates tab

fuel_network_page_loads.details: Page loads with POI categories: TRUCK STOP CHAINS, SERVICES, AMENITIES

select_up_to_5_pois.details: User can select up to 5 POI types, counter shows X/5

6th_selection_blocked.details: 6th option is disabled/blocked with cursor-not-allowed and opacity-40 classes

gold_chips_in_your_network.details: Selected POIs shown as gold chips with MapPin icon and X button in 'Your Network' section

clear_button.details: Clear button removes all selections, counter resets to 0/5

deselect_via_chip_click.details: Clicking a selected chip deselects it and removes from Your Network

localstorage_persistence.details: Selections persist to localStorage as 'fuel_network_selections' and persist across view changes

heading_up_default.details: isNorthUp defaults to false (heading-up mode), localStorage nav_north_up is 'false'

touch_rotation_code.details: Two-finger rotation code exists in NavigationView.tsx lines 343-384

voice_alert_thresholds.details: Voice alerts at 25mi, 10mi, 5mi, 2mi thresholds in updateNavigationState function

navigation_view_imports_getFuelNetworkSe.details: getFuelNetworkSelections imported at line 85 and used at line 1677
